message:
Add missing ARIA labels to interactive elements (#4893)

- Add aria-label and aria-pressed to buttons in AlertRuleEditor
  (severity, enabled toggle, condition type, cluster filter, channel
  add/toggle/remove, AI diagnose)
- Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative icons in AlertRuleEditor
- Add aria-label and aria-pressed to onboarding option buttons
- Add aria-label to CardHistory clear/filter/restore/remove buttons
- Add aria-label to PageErrorBoundary action buttons

Fixes #4891

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
